The associated credentials and configuration are for connecting Codex CLI only and do not apply to other clients, platforms, or channels.

The system prices internally in USD. All displayed amounts—user balance, top-up amount, model pricing, usage logs, etc.—are converted to a custom currency at this exchange rate, without affecting internal billing.

translation.高危状态码重试风险告知与免责声明Markdown:
### ⚠️ High-Risk Operation: 504/524 Status Code Retry Risk Disclosure and Disclaimer
By default, this project does not retry the `400 (Bad Request)`, `504 (Gateway Timeout)`, and `524 (CDN Timeout)` status codes.
504 and 524 errors usually mean that **the request has been successfully delivered to the upstream AI service and the upstream is processing it, but the connection was dropped because processing took too long**.

Enabling redirect/retry for such timeout status codes is an **extremely high-risk operation**. As a user of this open-source project, before enabling this feature you must carefully read and acknowledge the following serious consequences:

#### 1. Core Risk Disclosure (please read carefully)
1. 💸 Double/multiple billing risk: The vast majority of upstream AI providers **will still charge** for requests that have started processing but were interrupted due to network issues (504/524). If a retry is triggered at this point, it will send a brand-new request to the upstream, resulting in **double or even multiple billing**.
2. ⏳ Severe client timeout: A single request has already timed out, and adding a retry mechanism will multiply the total request time, causing severe or even completely unacceptable timeouts for your end client (or caller).
3. 💥 Request backlog and system crash risk: Forcibly retrying timed-out requests occupies system threads and connections for a long time. Under high concurrency, this can cause a serious **request backlog**, which in turn exhausts system resources, triggers a cascading failure, and crashes your entire proxy service.

#### 2. Risk Confirmation Statement
If you insist on enabling this feature, you are making the following confirmations:
translation.高危状态码重试风险确认输入文本: I understand the risks of multiple billing and crashes, and confirm enabling it
translation.高危状态码重试风险确认项1: I have fully read and understood: I have read all of the above risk warnings in full and completely understand the destructive consequences that forcibly retrying 504 and 524 status codes may cause.
translation.高危状态码重试风险确认项2: I have communicated with and confirmed with the upstream: I confirm that the current timeout issue is a bottleneck of the upstream service. I have communicated with the upstream provider and confirmed that the upstream cannot resolve this timeout issue, which is why the forced retry approach is adopted as a compromise.
translation.高危状态码重试风险确认项3: I voluntarily bear the billing losses: I am aware of and accept all double/multiple billing risks arising from this, and promise not to submit issues or complaints in this project's repository over billing anomalies caused by retries.
translation.高危状态码重试风险确认项4: I voluntarily bear the system stability risks: I am aware that this operation may cause severe client timeouts and service crashes. If enabling this feature causes a request backlog or service unavailability, I will bear the consequences myself.
